query:
INSERT INTO public.vocabulary_words (word, definition, example_sentence, part_of_speech, difficulty, exam_type)
VALUES
  ('Morbid', 'Suggesting an unhealthy mental state, unwholesomely gloomy', 'Her morbid became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mordacious', 'Biting, causing a physical bite or sting, corrosive', 'The passage presents a mordacious portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mordant', 'Sharply caustic or sarcastic, as wit or a speaker, biting', 'Her mordant became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Moribund', 'In a dying state, near death', 'Scholars noted a striking moribund between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Morose', 'Sullen and ill-tempered', 'Her morose became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Morphological', 'Related to the form or structure of things', '“The morphological differences between species help scientists classify them.”', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Morphology', 'The part of biology dealing with the structure of organisms', 'Her morphology became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mortician', 'An undertaker or funeral director', 'Her mortician became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mortify', 'To humiliate or shame, as by injury to one''s pride', 'The author hoped the new policy would mortify tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mosaic', 'An image made of small, colored pieces of glass', 'The essay highlights the mosaic of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mote', 'A small particle or speck, especially of dust', 'Her mote became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Motif', 'A recurring or dominant element, a theme', 'The essay highlights the motif of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Motley', 'Comprising greatly varied elements, heterogeneous', 'Scholars noted a striking motley between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mottl', 'To mark with spots or blotches of a different color', 'Scholars noted a striking mottl between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Motto', 'A maxim adopted as an expression of a guiding principle', 'Scholars noted a striking motto between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mountaineer', 'Someone who lives in a mountainous area', 'The essay highlights the mountaineer of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mountainous', 'Having many mountains, rough (terrain), rocky', 'The reviewer described the tone as mountainous, which shaped how readers interpreted the claim.', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mountebank', 'A person selling quack medicines, in a public place', 'Scholars noted a striking mountebank between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Muddle', 'To mix together, to mix up, to confuse', 'Critics argued that the plan might muddle the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Muffle', 'To wrap up in fabric for warmth or protection', 'Critics argued that the plan might muffle the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mulatto', 'A person of mixed african and caucasian descent', 'Her mulatto became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Muleteer', 'A mule driver', 'Her muleteer became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Multifacet', 'Having many aspects or dimensions', '“Her research took a multifaceted approach to solving the problem.”', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Multifarious', 'Having great diversity or variety', 'The passage presents a multifarious portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Multiform', 'Having more than one shape or appearance', 'The reviewer described the tone as multiform, which shaped how readers interpreted the claim.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Multiplicity', 'A large number or variety', 'The essay highlights the multiplicity of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mundane', 'Ordinary, lacking excitement, or routine', '“He found his office job mundane and uninspiring.”', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Municipal', 'Relating to the local government or administration of a city or town', 'Critics argued that the plan might municipal the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Munificence', 'Generosity in giving', 'The essay highlights the munificence of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Munificent', 'Very generous', '“The munificent donor contributed millions to the university.”', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Murky', 'Hard to see through, as a fog or mist', 'The author hoped the new policy would murky tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Muse', 'To become lost in thought, to ponder', 'The author hoped the new policy would muse tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Muster', 'To gather, summon, rouse (often followed by up )', 'The author hoped the new policy would muster tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Musty', 'Having a stale odor', 'The passage presents a musty portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mutable', 'Able to change', 'The author hoped the new policy would mutable tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mutation', 'Any alteration or change', 'Scholars noted a striking mutation between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mutilate', 'To injure or make imperfect by irreparably damaging parts', 'Critics argued that the plan might mutilate the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mutiny', 'Revolt or rebellion against constituted authority', 'Scholars noted a striking mutiny between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Myopia', 'A disorder of the eyes where distant objects appear blurred', 'The essay highlights the myopia of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Myriad', 'Countless or extremely large in number', 'The essay highlights the myriad of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mystic', 'Involving otherworldly or symbolic practices or content', 'Her mystic became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mystification', 'The act of mystifying or the condition of being mystified', 'Scholars noted a striking mystification between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mystique', 'An aura of heightened meaning or mystery around a thing', 'Scholars noted a striking mystique between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Nadir', 'Lowest point', 'Scholars noted a striking nadir between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Naphtha', 'Naturally-occurring liquid petroleum', 'Her naphtha became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Narcissus', 'A bulbous plant of the Amyrillis family', 'Her narcissus became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Narrate', 'To relate a story or series of events by speech or writing', 'Over time, the community learned to narrate its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Nasal', 'Of or pertaining to the nose', 'Critics argued that the plan might nasal the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Nascent', 'Just beginning to develop', '“The nascent technology showed great promise.”', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Natal', 'Of or relating to birth', 'The author hoped the new policy would natal tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type)
ON CONFLICT (word, exam_type) DO UPDATE SET
  definition = EXCLUDED.definition,
  example_sentence = EXCLUDED.example_sentence,
  part_of_speech = EXCLUDED.part_of_speech,
  difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty;
